SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "ReminderSchedulers" AS r
WHERE r."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (r."IsDeleted") AND NOT (r."IsActive") AND r."UserId" = @_userInfoToken_Id AND NOT (r."IsRead")

SELECT s1."Id" AS "SalesOrderId", s1."OrderNumber" AS "SalesOrderNumber", s1."DeliveryDate" AS "ExpectedShipmentDate", (
    SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
        WHEN s2."Status" = 0 THEN s2."Quantity"
        ELSE -s2."Quantity"
    END), 0.0)
    FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s2
    WHERE s1."Id" = s2."SalesOrderId") AS "Quantity", s1."CustomerId", c0."CustomerName"
FROM (
    SELECT s."Id", s."CustomerId", s."DeliveryDate", s."OrderNumber"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest") AND s."DeliveryStatus" = 1 AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@_userInfoToken_LocationIds) AND (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
            WHEN s0."Status" = 0 THEN s0."Quantity"
            ELSE -s0."Quantity"
        END), 0.0)
        FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s0
        WHERE s."Id" = s0."SalesOrderId") > 0.0
    ORDER BY s."DeliveryDate" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS s1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c."Id", c."CustomerName"
    FROM "Customers" AS c
    WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted")
) AS c0 ON s1."CustomerId" = c0."Id"
ORDER BY s1."DeliveryDate" DESC

SELECT s0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(s0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT s."TotalAmount", date_part('month', s."SOCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', s."SOCreatedDate")::int = @lastYear AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest")
) AS s0
GROUP BY s0."Key"

SELECT p1."Id" AS "PurchaseOrderId", p1."OrderNumber" AS "PurchaseOrderNumber", p1."DeliveryDate" AS "ExpectedDispatchDate", s0."SupplierName", p1."SupplierId", (
    SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
        WHEN p2."Status" = 0 THEN p2."Quantity"
        ELSE -p2."Quantity"
    END), 0.0)
    FROM "PurchaseOrderItems" AS p2
    WHERE p1."Id" = p2."PurchaseOrderId") AS "TotalQuantity"
FROM (
    SELECT p."Id", p."DeliveryDate", p."OrderNumber", p."SupplierId"
    FROM "PurchaseOrders" AS p
    WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted") AND NOT (p."IsPurchaseOrderRequest") AND p."DeliveryStatus" = 0 AND p."LocationId" = ANY (@_userInfoToken_LocationIds) AND (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
            WHEN p0."Status" = 0 THEN p0."Quantity"
            ELSE -p0."Quantity"
        END), 0.0)
        FROM "PurchaseOrderItems" AS p0
        WHERE p."Id" = p0."PurchaseOrderId") > 0.0
    ORDER BY p."DeliveryDate" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS p1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s."Id", s."SupplierName"
    FROM "Suppliers" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted")
) AS s0 ON p1."SupplierId" = s0."Id"
ORDER BY p1."DeliveryDate" DESC

SELECT s0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(s0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT s."TotalAmount", date_part('month', s."SOCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', s."SOCreatedDate")::int = @currentYear AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest")
) AS s0
GROUP BY s0."Key"

SELECT p0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(p0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT p."TotalAmount", date_part('month', p."POCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "PurchaseOrders" AS p
    WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', p."POCreatedDate")::int = @lastYear AND p."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (p."IsPurchaseOrderRequest")
) AS p0
GROUP BY p0."Key"

SELECT s0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(s0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT s."TotalAmount", date_part('month', s."SOCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', s."SOCreatedDate")::int = @currentYear AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest")
) AS s0
GROUP BY s0."Key"

SELECT p0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(p0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT p."TotalAmount", date_part('month', p."POCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "PurchaseOrders" AS p
    WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', p."POCreatedDate")::int = @currentYear AND p."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (p."IsPurchaseOrderRequest")
) AS p0

SELECT s0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(s0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT s."TotalAmount", date_part('month', s."SOCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', s."SOCreatedDate")::int = @lastYear AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest")
) AS s0
GROUP BY s0."Key"

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Customers" AS c
WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted") AND (c."SalesPersonId" = @userId OR (c."LocationId" IS NOT NULL AND c."LocationId" = ANY (@allowedLocations)))

SELECT (
    SELECT p0."Name"
    FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s2
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT s4."Id", s4."LocationId", s4."SOCreatedDate"
        FROM "SalesOrders" AS s4
        WHERE s4."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s4."IsDeleted")
    ) AS s3 ON s2."SalesOrderId" = s3."Id"
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT p."Id", p."Name"
        FROM "Products" AS p
        WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted")
    ) AS p0 ON s2."ProductId" = p0."Id"
    WHERE s3."SOCreatedDate" >= @fromDate AND s3."SOCreatedDate" < @toDate AND s3."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND s."ProductId" = s2."ProductId"
    LIMIT 1) AS "Name", COALESCE(sum(CASE
    WHEN s."Status" = 1 THEN -1.0 * s."Quantity"
    ELSE s."Quantity"
END), 0.0) AS "Count"
FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s0."Id", s0."LocationId", s0."SOCreatedDate"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s0
    WHERE s0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s0."IsDeleted")
) AS s1 ON s."SalesOrderId" = s1."Id"
WHERE s1."SOCreatedDate" >= @fromDate AND s1."SOCreatedDate" < @toDate AND s1."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds)
GROUP BY s."ProductId"
ORDER BY COALESCE(sum(CASE
    WHEN s."Status" = 1 THEN -1.0 * s."Quantity"
    ELSE s."Quantity"
END), 0.0) DESC
LIMIT @p

SELECT s."ProductId", COALESCE(sum(s."Quantity"), 0.0) AS "Quantity", COALESCE(sum((s."Quantity" * s."UnitPrice" - s."Discount") + s."TaxValue"), 0.0) AS "Revenue"
FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s0."Id", s0."LocationId", s0."SOCreatedDate"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s0
    WHERE s0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s0."IsDeleted")
) AS s1 ON s."SalesOrderId" = s1."Id"
WHERE s1."SOCreatedDate" >= @startOfLastYear AND s1."SOCreatedDate" < @endOfLastYear AND s1."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND s."ProductId" = ANY (@topProductIds) AND s."Status" <> 1
GROUP BY s."ProductId"

SELECT c."Id", c."Address", c."BusinessType", c."CreatedBy", c."CreatedDate", c."CurrencyCode", c."DeletedBy", c."DeletedDate", c."Email", c."IsDeleted", c."LastSyncedAt", c."LicenseKey", c."LogoUrl", c."ModifiedBy", c."ModifiedDate", c."Phone", c."PurchaseCode", c."SyncVersion", c."TaxName", c."TaxNumber", c."TenantId", c."Title"
FROM "CompanyProfiles" AS c
WHERE FALSE
LIMIT 1

SELECT s."ProductId", s."TaxId", s."CreatedBy", s."CreatedDate", s."DeletedBy", s."DeletedDate", s."Id", s."IsDeleted", s."LastSyncedAt", s."ModifiedBy", s."ModifiedDate", s."SyncVersion", s."TenantId", s."Id0", s."CreatedBy0", s."CreatedDate0", s."DeletedBy0", s."DeletedDate0", s."InPutAccountCode", s."IsDeleted0", s."LastSyncedAt0", s."ModifiedBy0", s."ModifiedDate0", s."Name", s."OutPutAccountCode", s."Percentage", s."SyncVersion0", s."TenantId0", p0."Id", b0."Id", p2."Id", u0."Id"
FROM (
    SELECT p."Id", p."BrandId", p."CategoryId", p."Name", p."UnitId"
    FROM "Products" AS p
    WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted")
    ORDER BY p."Name"
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS p0
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b."Id"
    FROM "Brands" AS b
    WHERE b."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (b."IsDeleted")
) AS b0 ON p0."BrandId" = b0."Id"
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT p1."Id"
    FROM "ProductCategories" AS p1
    WHERE p1."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p1."IsDeleted")
) AS p2 ON p0."CategoryId" = p2."Id"
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT u."Id"
    FROM "UnitConversations" AS u
    WHERE u."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (u."IsDeleted")
) AS u0 ON p0."UnitId" = u0."Id"
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT p3."ProductId", p3."TaxId", p3."CreatedBy", p3."CreatedDate", p3."DeletedBy", p3."DeletedDate", p3."Id", p3."IsDeleted", p3."LastSyncedAt", p3."ModifiedBy", p3."ModifiedDate", p3."SyncVersion", p3."TenantId", t0."Id" AS "Id0", t0."CreatedBy" AS "CreatedBy0", t0."CreatedDate" AS "CreatedDate0", t0."DeletedBy" AS "DeletedBy0", t0."DeletedDate" AS "DeletedDate0", t0."InPutAccountCode", t0."IsDeleted" AS "IsDeleted0", t0."LastSyncedAt" AS "LastSyncedAt0", t0."ModifiedBy" AS "ModifiedBy0", t0."ModifiedDate" AS "ModifiedDate0", t0."Name", t0."OutPutAccountCode", t0."Percentage", t0."SyncVersion" AS "SyncVersion0", t0."TenantId" AS "TenantId0"
    FROM "ProductTaxes" AS p3
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT t."Id", t."CreatedBy", t."CreatedDate", t."DeletedBy", t."DeletedDate", t."InPutAccountCode", t."IsDeleted", t."LastSyncedAt", t."ModifiedBy", t."ModifiedDate", t."Name", t."OutPutAccountCode", t."Percentage", t."SyncVersion", t."TenantId"
        FROM "Taxes" AS t
        WHERE t."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (t."IsDeleted")
    ) AS t0 ON p3."TaxId" = t0."Id"
    WHERE p3."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p3."IsDeleted")
) AS s ON p0."Id" = s."ProductId"
ORDER BY p0."Name", p0."Id", b0."Id", p2."Id", u0."Id"

SELECT s1."Id", s1."ContactPerson", s1."Description", s1."Fax", s1."SupplierName", s1."Website", s1."MobileNo", s1."PhoneNo", s1."Email", s2."CountryName" AS "Country"
FROM (
    SELECT s."Id", s."BillingAddressId", s."ContactPerson", s."Description", s."Email", s."Fax", s."MobileNo", s."PhoneNo", s."SupplierName", s."Website"
    FROM "Suppliers" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted")
    ORDER BY s."SupplierName"
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS s1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s0."Id", s0."CountryName"
    FROM "SupplierAddresses" AS s0
    WHERE s0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s0."IsDeleted")
) AS s2 ON s1."BillingAddressId" = s2."Id"
ORDER BY s1."SupplierName"

SELECT c."Id", c."CustomerName", c."Email", c."ContactPerson", c."MobileNo", c."Website", c."IsWalkIn"

ORDER BY c."CustomerName"
LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p

SELECT p1."Id" AS "PurchaseOrderId", p1."OrderNumber" AS "PurchaseOrderNumber", p1."DeliveryDate" AS "ExpectedDispatchDate", s0."SupplierName", p1."SupplierId", (
    SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
        WHEN p2."Status" = 0 THEN p2."Quantity"

    END), 0.0)

SELECT p1."Id" AS "PurchaseOrderId", p1."OrderNumber" AS "PurchaseOrderNumber", p1."DeliveryDate" AS "ExpectedDispatchDate", s0."SupplierName", p1."SupplierId", (
    SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
        WHEN p2."Status" = 0 THEN p2."Quantity"
        ELSE -p2."Quantity"
    END), 0.0)
    FROM "PurchaseOrderItems" AS p2
    WHERE p1."Id" = p2."PurchaseOrderId") AS "TotalQuantity"
FROM (
    SELECT p."Id", p."DeliveryDate", p."OrderNumber", p."SupplierId"
    FROM "PurchaseOrders" AS p
    WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted") AND NOT (p."IsPurchaseOrderRequest") AND p."DeliveryStatus" = 0 AND p."LocationId" = ANY (@_userInfoToken_LocationIds) AND (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
            WHEN p0."Status" = 0 THEN p0."Quantity"
            ELSE -p0."Quantity"
        END), 0.0)
        FROM "PurchaseOrderItems" AS p0
        WHERE p."Id" = p0."PurchaseOrderId") > 0.0
    ORDER BY p."DeliveryDate" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS p1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s."Id", s."SupplierName"
    FROM "Suppliers" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted")
) AS s0 ON p1."SupplierId" = s0."Id"
ORDER BY p1."DeliveryDate" DESC

SELECT s1."Id" AS "SalesOrderId", s1."OrderNumber" AS "SalesOrderNumber", s1."DeliveryDate" AS "ExpectedShipmentDate", (
    SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
        WHEN s2."Status" = 0 THEN s2."Quantity"
        ELSE -s2."Quantity"
    END), 0.0)
    FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s2
    WHERE s1."Id" = s2."SalesOrderId") AS "Quantity", s1."CustomerId", c0."CustomerName"
FROM (
    SELECT s."Id", s."CustomerId", s."DeliveryDate", s."OrderNumber"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest") AND s."DeliveryStatus" = 1 AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@_userInfoToken_LocationIds) AND (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
            WHEN s0."Status" = 0 THEN s0."Quantity"
            ELSE -s0."Quantity"
        END), 0.0)
        FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s0
        WHERE s."Id" = s0."SalesOrderId") > 0.0
    ORDER BY s."DeliveryDate" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS s1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c."Id", c."CustomerName"
    FROM "Customers" AS c
    WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted")
) AS c0 ON s1."CustomerId" = c0."Id"
ORDER BY s1."DeliveryDate" DESC

SELECT s1."Id", s1."ContactPerson", s1."Description", s1."Fax", s1."SupplierName", s1."Website", s1."MobileNo", s1."PhoneNo", s1."Email", s2."CountryName" AS "Country"
FROM (
    SELECT s."Id", s."BillingAddressId", s."ContactPerson", s."Description", s."Email", s."Fax", s."MobileNo", s."PhoneNo", s."SupplierName", s."Website"
    FROM "Suppliers" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted")
    ORDER BY s."SupplierName"
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS s1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s0."Id", s0."CountryName"
    FROM "SupplierAddresses" AS s0
    WHERE s0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s0."IsDeleted")
) AS s2 ON s1."BillingAddressId" = s2."Id"
ORDER BY s1."SupplierName"

SELECT c."Id", c."CustomerName", c."Email", c."ContactPerson", c."MobileNo", c."Website", c."IsWalkIn"
FROM "Customers" AS c
WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted") AND (c."SalesPersonId" = @userId OR (c."LocationId" IS NOT NULL AND c."LocationId" = ANY (@allowedLocations)))
ORDER BY c."CustomerName"
LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p

SELECT p1."Id" AS "PurchaseOrderId", p1."OrderNumber" AS "PurchaseOrderNumber", p1."DeliveryDate" AS "ExpectedDispatchDate", s0."SupplierName", p1."SupplierId", (
    SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
        WHEN p2."Status" = 0 THEN p2."Quantity"
        ELSE -p2."Quantity"
    END), 0.0)
    FROM "PurchaseOrderItems" AS p2
    WHERE p1."Id" = p2."PurchaseOrderId") AS "TotalQuantity"
FROM (
    SELECT p."Id", p."DeliveryDate", p."OrderNumber", p."SupplierId"
    FROM "PurchaseOrders" AS p
    WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted") AND NOT (p."IsPurchaseOrderRequest") AND p."DeliveryStatus" = 0 AND p."LocationId" = ANY (@_userInfoToken_LocationIds) AND (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
            WHEN p0."Status" = 0 THEN p0."Quantity"
            ELSE -p0."Quantity"
        END), 0.0)
        FROM "PurchaseOrderItems" AS p0
        WHERE p."Id" = p0."PurchaseOrderId") > 0.0
    ORDER BY p."DeliveryDate" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS p1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s."Id", s."SupplierName"
    FROM "Suppliers" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted")
) AS s0 ON p1."SupplierId" = s0."Id"
ORDER BY p1."DeliveryDate" DESC

SELECT u."Id", u."Name", u."ParentId", CASE
    WHEN u1."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(u1."Name", '') || '(' || COALESCE(u1."Code", '') || ')'
    ELSE ''
END AS "BaseUnitName", u."Value", u."Operator", u."Code"
FROM "UnitConversations" AS u
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT u0."Id", u0."Code", u0."Name"
    FROM "UnitConversations" AS u0
    WHERE u0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (u0."IsDeleted")
) AS u1 ON u."ParentId" = u1."Id"
WHERE u."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (u."IsDeleted")
ORDER BY u."Name"
